title: Channel Capability Baseline
objective: Prove the target OpenClaw runtime executes the shared message-channel capability behavior expected by Kova before adapter-specific conformance runs.

phases.title: Provision Runtime Env
phases.intent: Create a disposable OpenClaw environment with the selected target runtime so Kova can execute the release-shaped shared channel-message runtime path.

phases.title: OpenClaw Channel Capability Baseline
phases.intent: Import the selected OpenClaw runtime's packaged channel-message helpers, exercise shared message-channel behavior with deterministic in-memory adapters, and emit one baseline proof row per OpenClaw channel capability catalog entry.
